name: Għar Lapsi
description: Small bay near Siġġiewi. Lies about 1 km south-west of the Blue Grotto.

name: Ġnejna Bay Unnamed Secret Spot
description: TBA

name: Il-Kalanka
description: Very stunning beach. Hidden gem with barely anyone. Clean water. Long walk.

name: St. Thomas Bay
description: Small sandy area plus flat limestone areas. Easy access to water. Lifeguards and roped swimming area.

name: Top of the World
description: Scenic spot in Għargħur. Stunning. Theres benches and those exercise things in parks. Good for trekking.

name: Żonqor
description: Niche rocky beach. Beautfiul place to swmin and hang out. Wonderful.

name: Chinese Garden
description: Very nice garden/park to relax in. Good for killing time and taking a break.

name: Airport
description: The Airport has many shops/restaurants. Good alternative for baystreet/shoreline

name: Jerma Palace Hotel
description: Most popular Urbex location in Malta. Huge abandoned hotel. Graffiti everywhere. Do not go alone or at night.

name: Għajn Tuffieħa
description: Beach with dark sand. Popular for surfing. Set in a bay backed by hills.

name: Blata tal-Melħ
description: Hidden gem. Atmospheric and dramatic cliffs. Cannot swim. Long hike. Amazing sunset.

name: Għar Ħanżir
description: Small niche empty cave in the heart of wied. Might actually find a pig nearby.

name: Golden Bay
description: Scenic beach cove with fine sand. Rocky cliffs and shallow water. Resort hotels & restaurants.

name: Sant'Antnin Family Park
description: Big park with animals, playground and more. For everyone. Nice place to walk.

name: Għar Ħanek
description: Very blue water. Amazing plcae to swim. Stunning.

name: Miżieb Woodland
description: Best alternative to Buskett. Very natural. Peace and tranquility.

name: Verdala Palace
description: Very amazing outside and in. Aesthetically delightful in furnishing and decor. Torture dungeon below.

name: Verdala Palace
description: Very amazing outside and in. Aesthetically delightful in furnishing and decor. Torture dungeon below.

name: L-Aħrax + L-Armier
description: (to be expanded upon later)

name: Chadwick Lakes
description: Only natural stream of water. Good for hiking, picnics and relaxing.

name: Floriana Garden
description: Beautiful place for killing time. Forest-Like. Recomennded to go in the morning. Photoshoots

name: The Red Tower
description: Beautiful place for killing time. Forest-Like. Recomennded to go in the morning. Photoshoots

name: Wied Ta' (Baqqiegha)
description: One of the most unknown wied. Not alot of info about it

name: Wied Tal-Isperanza
description: Quiet and peaceful walk. Watery.

name: Congreve Memorial
description: Cool monument on the path from one temple to the other. Gaze over the spectacular landscape. 1h hike.

name: Ħal-Farrug Family Park
description: Nice post hangout resting spot. I would go here in the evening to fuck around idk..
